description: A channel-index verifier that does not implement the companion marketplace contract fetches a validly-signed index carrying a mix of entries: a recognized platform-release entry and an entry whose kind is the companion-defined value 'pack' the verifier does not recognize. Per CHI-031, the verifier must skip the unrecognized-kind entry (treat it as not-resolvable, as if absent) and still resolve the recognized entry -- never refusing the whole index over the unknown kind, extending CHI-090's additive-tolerance from an unknown field to an unknown value of the required kind field. An unrecognized status value must likewise never be read as 'active'.
